collectible.name: French Foreign Legion Beret
collectible.description:
French Foreign Legion green beret from the Algerian War period. The distinctive green color identifies the wearer as a member of the legendary L�gion �trang�re.
This beret features the seven-flame grenade badge of the Foreign Legion, a symbol dating back to the unit's formation in 1831. The interior shows the manufacturer's label and size markings.
The beret is shaped in the traditional French military style, worn tilted to the right with the badge positioned over the left eye. Excellent condition with minimal wear to the wool fabric.
